name: Angel Food Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake in half.
2. Tear one half into small pieces and set aside.
3. Cut the other half into 12-14 thin slices.
4. Arrange the slices in a wax paper-lined baking pan measuring 13 inches by 9 inches by 2 inches, overlapping as needed.
5. Spread softened ice cream over the cake, pressing down to smooth.
6. Gently press the small cake pieces into the ice cream.
7. Cover and freeze until ready to serve.
8. Just before serving, slice strawberries and sweeten to taste.
9. Cut dessert into squares and top with strawberries.
Serves 15.
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (prepared with sugar-free ice cream and sugar substitute) equals 1.5 starch, 1 fat, 0.5 fruit; also, 183 calories, 131 mg sodium, 15 mg cholesterol, 34 gm carbohydrate, 6 gm protein, 4 gm fat.
